rows.description: Merton Div: to Lady Day P.184
rows.notes: Visual verification revealed 'gpt-5-mini' had the correct 'P.184' in the description (gemini-flash had 'P.104' and an extra 'Dno'). However, 'gemini-flash' correctly identified amounts as 166 pounds, empty shillings (dash), and 10 pence with a 3/4 fraction. 'gpt-5-mini' incorrectly read shillings as 10 and pence as 1 and a 1/4 fraction.
